swahili.a_3_tier_step_pyramid_v_9_4_1_14_cubes: Piramidi ya hatua ya ngazi 3. V = 9 + 4 + 1 = 14 mchemraba.
swahili.a_4_4_base_with_hollow_interior_wall_t: Msingi wa 4×4 wenye ndani tupu — unene wa ukuta 1. Hesabu mchemraba wa ukuta pekee.
swahili.two_pillars_connected_by_a_deck_v_6_6_: Nguzo mbili zilizounganishwa na sitaha — V = 6 + 6 + 5 = 17.
swahili.tapering_tower_each_level_smaller_than: Mnara unaopungua. Kila ngazi ndogo kuliko iliyotangulia.
swahili.5_cube_plus_shape_1_layer_v_5: Umbo la kujumlisha kutoka mchemraba 5, safu 1. V = 5.
swahili.a_simple_arch_over_an_opening: Upinde rahisi juu ya nafasi wazi.
swahili.walls_flat_roof_v_4_4_base_wall_roof: Kuta + paa bapa. V = 4×4 msingi wa ukuta + paa.
swahili.interactive_net_drag_the_slider_to_fol: 🗺 Wavu shirikishi — buruta kitelezi ili kukunja wavu wa 2D kuwa mche wa 3D
swahili.fold_the_net_from_flat_0_to_fully_fold: Kunja wavu kutoka bapa (0) hadi umekunjwa kabisa (1)
swahili.when_the_net_folds_up_completely_you_c: Wavu ukikunjwa kabisa, unaona mche. Eneo la uso ni eneo la nyuso zote 6 — karatasi ya kufungia.
swahili.net_the_6_faces_unfolded_onto_a_2d_lay: 🗺 Wavu — nyuso 6 zimefunuliwa kwenye mpangilio wa 2D
swahili.fold_the_net_up_and_you_get_the_prism_: Kunja wavu na unapata mche. Eneo la uso ni jumla ya eneo la nyuso 6 — karatasi ya kufungia au rangi utakayohitaji.
swahili.volume_out_of_range_for_comparison_try: Ujazo uko nje ya kipimo cha kulinganisha. Jaribu mche mdogo (V ≤ 1000).
swahili.volume_grows_as_the_cube_of_the_dimens: ujazo hukua kama mchemraba wa kipimo; eneo la uso hukua kama mraba. V sawa, lakini eneo tofauti sana.
swahili.a_cube_is_the_most_surface_efficient_p: Mchemraba ni umbo la mche lenye ufanisi zaidi wa uso.
swahili.it_is_why_elephants_need_thick_legs_vo: Ndiyo sababu tembo wanahitaji miguu minene (ujazo → uzito hukua haraka kuliko sehemu ya mfupa),
swahili.why_cells_stay_small_need_surface_area: kwa nini seli hubaki ndogo (zinahitaji uso kunyonya virutubisho), na kwa nini uzuiaji joto hufanya kazi (maumbo ya mviringo huhifadhi joto).
swahili.tap_any_row_above_to_swap_the_3d_prism: 👆 Gusa safu yoyote hapo juu ili kubadilisha mche wa 3D kuwa umbo hilo — ona ujazo uleule katika mwonekano mwingine.
swahili.recent_attempts_newest_at_right: Majaribio ya hivi karibuni (mpya zaidi kulia)
swahili.reset_3d_view_rotation_and_zoom: Weka upya mzunguko na ukuzaji wa mwonekano wa 3D
swahili.slider_v_l_w_h_watch_it_grow: Kitelezi — V = urefu × upana × kimo, tazama ukikua
swahili.sliders_snap_to_integer_dimensions_gre: Vitelezi hushikamana na vipimo kamili — bora kwa mwonekano wa kwanza: kuongeza maradufu kila upande huzidisha ujazo kwa 8 (2³). Eneo la uso hupimwa kama 2²; ujazo kama 2³. Sheria ya mraba-mchemraba inaeleza kwa nini tembo wana miguu minene na kwa nini vichwadili vinaweza kuanguka bila kuumia.
swahili.freeform_build_any_shape_count_cubes: Huru — jenga umbo lolote, hesabu mchemraba
swahili.l_blocks_hollow_shapes_irregular_prism: Vizuizi vya L, maumbo tupu, mche isiyo ya kawaida. Ujazo = jumla ya mchemraba bila kujali mpangilio. CCSS 5.MD.5: unganisha ujazo wa mche wa mstatili wima na kuzidisha na kujumlisha (V = b×h au kama jumla ya ujazo wa sehemu).
swahili.word_problems_volume_in_the_real_world: Matatizo ya maneno — ujazo katika ulimwengu halisi
swahili.a_fish_tank_with_5_3_4_60_cubes_of_wat: Tangi la samaki la 5×3×4 = mchemraba 60 wa maji. Kikasha cha chakula cha 4×3×2 = mchemraba 24 wa sandwichi. Kila kuzidisha kwa vipimo vitatu ni chombo halisi chenye uwezo halisi. CCSS 5.MD.5b: tatua matatizo ya ujazo ya ulimwengu halisi.
swahili.pick_a_context_to_make_volume_real: 🌍 Chagua muktadha ili kufanya ujazo uwe halisi:
swahili.volume_answer_for_word_problem: Jibu la ujazo kwa tatizo la maneno
swahili.the_rectangular_prism_above_shows_exac: 💡 Mche wa mstatili hapo juu unaonyesha hasa kile maneno yanaeleza. Ujazo ni idadi ya mchemraba za vipimo zinazotoshea ndani.
swahili.adjust_the_sliders_below_to_match_the_: Rekebisha vitelezi hapa chini ili vilingane na hadithi — au jaribu muktadha mpya. Tatua matatizo 5 ili kupata 📝 Mchawi wa Maneno. Tembelea miktadha yote 8 kwa 🌍 Mgunduzi wa Ulimwengu Halisi.
swahili.click_grid_to_place_cubes_click_cube_t: 👉 Bofya gridi ili kuweka mchemraba • Bofya mchemraba ili kuiondoa • Bofya juu ili kupanga
swahili.interactive_3d_viewport_drag_swipe_or_: Dirisha shirikishi la 3D. Buruta, telezesha au tumia vitufe vya mishale kuzungusha. Finya au +/- kukuza. R kuweka upya mwonekano.
swahili.visual_is_a_voxel_approximation_built_: ⚠ Mwonekano ni makadirio ya vokseli (yaliyojengwa kutoka mchemraba za vipimo). Fomula
swahili.slice_horizontally_to_see_the_area_tim: Kata mlalo ili kuona uhusiano wa eneo mara kina
swahili.square_units_volume_cross_section_area: vipimo vya mraba. Ujazo = (eneo la sehemu-mtambuka) × (kina) ni msingi wa kalkulasi ya ujumuishaji.
swahili.volume_predictor_sense_check: 📊 Kitabiri cha ujazo — ukaguzi wa mantiki
swahili.adjust_your_predicted_dimensions_compa: Rekebisha vipimo ulivyotabiri, linganisha na mche halisi. Matokeo tofauti: karibu/wastani/mbali. Hakuna alama, hakuna ufunuo.
swahili.hypothesis_how_do_you_build_intuition_: Dhana: Unajengaje utambuzi wa kutabiri ujazo?
swahili.which_dimension_affects_volume_the_mos: Ni kipimo gani kinachoathiri ujazo zaidi?
swahili.try_halving_one_dimension_what_happens: Jaribu kupunguza kipimo kimoja nusu — ujazo unafanya nini?
swahili.when_are_predictions_hardest_when_easi: Ni lini utabiri ni mgumu zaidi? Ni lini rahisi zaidi?
swahili.explain_how_each_dimension_contributes: Eleza jinsi kila kipimo kinachochangia ujazo jumla.
swahili.design_note_discrete_3_state_outcome_n: Dokezo la muundo: matokeo tofauti ya hali 3; hakuna alama kamili ya ujazo; hakuna ufunuo — kwa makusudi.
swahili.open_buildable_challenges_library: Fungua maktaba ya changamoto zinazoweza kujengwa
swahili.browse_named_structures_to_build: Vinjari miundo yenye majina ya kujenga
swahili.buildable_challenges_pick_a_structure_: 📚 Changamoto zinazoweza kujengwa — chagua muundo wa kujaribu
swahili.click_a_name_to_set_it_as_your_target_: Bofya jina ili kuliweka kama lengo lako — mchemraba zitaonekana kama muhtasari wa kivuli. Linganisha umbo, kisha Angalia.
swahili.save_current_dims_cubes_with_a_name: Hifadhi vipimo + mchemraba za sasa na jina
swahili.export_current_construction_as_png_ima: Hamisha ujenzi wa sasa kama picha ya PNG
swahili.download_a_png_snapshot_of_the_current: Pakua picha ya PNG ya ujenzi wa sasa
swahili.in_real_world_units_volume: 🌍 Katika vipimo vya ulimwengu halisi: Ujazo =
swahili.nothing_saved_yet_build_something_and_: Hakuna kilichohifadhiwa bado. Jenga kitu na ubofye 💾 Hifadhi.
swahili.6_solids_rotating_with_live_formulas: Miili 6 inayozunguka na fomula za moja kwa moja

hausa.4_steps_of_decreasing_size_v_4_3_2_1_1: Matakai 4 masu raguwa girma. V = 4 + 3 + 2 + 1 = 10 kubu.
hausa.a_3_tier_step_pyramid_v_9_4_1_14_cubes: Dala mai matakai na hawa 3. V = 9 + 4 + 1 = 14 kubu.
hausa.a_4_4_base_with_hollow_interior_wall_t: Tushe na 4×4 mai ciki rami — kaurin bango 1. Ƙidaya kubun bango kaɗai.
hausa.two_pillars_connected_by_a_deck_v_6_6_: Ginshiƙai biyu da aka haɗa da benaye — V = 6 + 6 + 5 = 17.
hausa.tapering_tower_each_level_smaller_than: Hasumiya mai raguwa. Kowane hawa ya fi na baya ƙanƙanta.
hausa.5_cube_plus_shape_1_layer_v_5: Siffar ƙarawa daga kubu 5, Layi 1. V = 5.
hausa.a_simple_arch_over_an_opening: Baka mai sauƙi bisa buɗaɗɗiyar wuri.
hausa.walls_flat_roof_v_4_4_base_wall_roof: Bango + rufi mai faɗi. V = 4×4 tushen bango + rufi.
hausa.interactive_net_drag_the_slider_to_fol: 🗺 Raga mai hulɗa — ja mai zamewa don naɗe raga na 2D zuwa prism na 3D
hausa.fold_the_net_from_flat_0_to_fully_fold: Naɗe raga daga faɗaɗɗe (0) zuwa cikakke naɗaɗɗe (1)
hausa.when_the_net_folds_up_completely_you_c: Lokacin da raga ya naɗe gaba ɗaya, kana ganin prism. Yankin saman shine yankin fuskoki 6 duka — takardar nannaɗi.
hausa.net_the_6_faces_unfolded_onto_a_2d_lay: 🗺 Raga — fuskoki 6 an buɗe su a shimfida na 2D
hausa.fold_the_net_up_and_you_get_the_prism_: Naɗe raga sai ka sami prism. Yankin saman shine jimlar yankin fuskoki 6 — takardar nannaɗi ko fenti da kake buƙata.
hausa.volume_out_of_range_for_comparison_try: Ƙarfin waje na kwatanta. Gwada ƙaramin prism (V ≤ 1000).
hausa.volume_grows_as_the_cube_of_the_dimens: ƙarfi yana girma kamar kubu na girma; yankin saman yana girma kamar murabba'i. Iri V, amma yanki daban sosai.
hausa.a_cube_is_the_most_surface_efficient_p: Kubu shine siffar prism mafi inganci ta saman.
hausa.it_is_why_elephants_need_thick_legs_vo: Shi ya sa giwaye suke buƙatar ƙafafu masu kauri (ƙarfi → nauyi yana girma da sauri fiye da yankin ƙashi),
hausa.why_cells_stay_small_need_surface_area: dalilin da ya sa ƙwayoyin halitta suke ci gaba da ƙanƙanta (suna buƙatar saman don shan abinci mai gina jiki), da dalilin da ya sa rufin zafi ke aiki (siffofi masu zagaye suna riƙe zafi).
hausa.tap_any_row_above_to_swap_the_3d_prism: 👆 Danna kowane layi a sama don canza prism na 3D zuwa wannan siffa — duba iri ƙarfi a wani yanayi.
hausa.reset_3d_view_rotation_and_zoom: Sake saita juyawa da girma na kallon 3D
hausa.slider_v_l_w_h_watch_it_grow: Mai zamewa — V = tsawo × faɗi × tsayi, duba yana girma
hausa.sliders_snap_to_integer_dimensions_gre: Masu zamewa suna manne wa ma'aunai cikakku — mai kyau ga kallon farko: ninka kowane gefe sau biyu yana ninka ƙarfi da 8 (2³). Yankin saman yana daidaitawa kamar 2²; ƙarfi kamar 2³. Dokar murabba'i-kubu tana bayyana dalilin da ya sa giwaye suke da ƙafafu masu kauri da dalilin da ya sa ɓeraye za su iya faɗuwa ba tare da rauni ba.
hausa.l_blocks_hollow_shapes_irregular_prism: Tubalan L, siffofi masu rami, prism marasa tsari. Ƙarfi = jimlar kubu ba tare da la'akari da tsari ba. CCSS 5.MD.5: haɗa ƙarfin prism madaidaici mai kusurwa huɗu da ninkawa da ƙarawa (V = b×h ko a matsayin jimlar ƙarfi na sassa).
hausa.word_problems_volume_in_the_real_world: Matsalolin kalmomi — ƙarfi a duniyar gaskiya
hausa.a_fish_tank_with_5_3_4_60_cubes_of_wat: Tankin kifi na 5×3×4 = kubu 60 na ruwa. Akwatin abinci na 4×3×2 = kubu 24 na sanwici. Kowace ninkawa ta ma'auni uku kwano ne na gaskiya mai ƙarfin gaske. CCSS 5.MD.5b: warware matsalolin ƙarfi na duniyar gaskiya.
hausa.pick_a_context_to_make_volume_real: 🌍 Zaɓi mahallin don sanya ƙarfi ya zama na gaskiya:
hausa.the_rectangular_prism_above_shows_exac: 💡 Prism mai kusurwa huɗu a sama yana nuna daidai abin da kalmomi ke bayyanawa. Ƙarfi shine adadin kubu na ma'auni da suke shiga ciki.
hausa.adjust_the_sliders_below_to_match_the_: Daidaita masu zamewa a ƙasa don su dace da labarin — ko gwada sabon mahalli. Warware matsaloli 5 don samun 📝 Mai Sihirin Kalma. Ziyarci dukkan mahallai 8 don 🌍 Mai Bincike Duniyar Gaskiya.
hausa.click_grid_to_place_cubes_click_cube_t: 👉 Danna grid don sanya kubu • Danna kubu don cire shi • Danna sama don tulawa
hausa.interactive_3d_viewport_drag_swipe_or_: Taga mai hulɗa na 3D. Ja, shafa, ko yi amfani da maɓallan kibiya don juyawa. Matse ko +/- don girma. R don sake saita kallo.
hausa.visual_is_a_voxel_approximation_built_: ⚠ Kallon ƙididdiga ne na voxel (an gina shi daga kubu na ma'auni). Tsari
hausa.gives_the_exact_analytic_volume: yana ba da ainihin ƙarfin nazari =
hausa.slice_horizontally_to_see_the_area_tim: Yanka a kwance don ganin dangantakar yanki sau zurfi
hausa.square_units_volume_cross_section_area: ma'aunan murabba'i. Ƙarfi = (yankin yanka giciye) × (zurfi) shine tushen lissafin haɗawa.
hausa.adjust_your_predicted_dimensions_compa: Daidaita ma'aunan da ka hasasa, kwatanta da prism na gaskiya. Sakamako daban: kusa/matsakaici/nesa. Babu maki, babu bayyanawa.
hausa.hypothesis_how_do_you_build_intuition_: Hasashe: Yaya kake gina fahimta don hasashen ƙarfi?
hausa.which_dimension_affects_volume_the_mos: Wane ma'auni ne yake shafar ƙarfi mafi yawa?
hausa.try_halving_one_dimension_what_happens: Gwada rage ma'auni ɗaya rabi — me ke faruwa ga ƙarfi?
hausa.when_are_predictions_hardest_when_easi: Yaushe hasashe ke da wahala sosai? Yaushe mafi sauƙi?
hausa.explain_how_each_dimension_contributes: Bayyana yadda kowane ma'auni ke bayar da gudummawa ga ƙarfi jimla.
hausa.design_note_discrete_3_state_outcome_n: Bayanin ƙira: sakamako daban na yanayi 3; babu ainihin makin ƙarfi; babu bayyanawa — da gangan.
hausa.open_buildable_challenges_library: Buɗe ɗakin karatu na ƙalubale masu ginuwa
hausa.browse_named_structures_to_build: Binciko gine-gine masu suna don ginawa
hausa.buildable_challenges_pick_a_structure_: 📚 Ƙalubale masu ginuwa — zaɓi tsari don gwadawa
hausa.click_a_name_to_set_it_as_your_target_: Danna suna don saita shi a matsayin burinka — kubu za su bayyana a matsayin fanka na inuwa. Daidaita siffa, sannan Duba.
hausa.save_current_dims_cubes_with_a_name: Ajiye ma'aunai + kubun yanzu da suna
hausa.export_current_construction_as_png_ima: Fitar da ginin yanzu a matsayin hoto na PNG
hausa.download_a_png_snapshot_of_the_current: Sauke hoton PNG na ginin yanzu
hausa.nothing_saved_yet_build_something_and_: Ba a ajiye komai ba tukuna. Gina wani abu ka danna 💾 Ajiye.
hausa.6_solids_rotating_with_live_formulas: Jikuna 6 masu juyawa da tsaruka kai tsaye
